features.name: byte_write_enable_memory
features.description: Code should include a memory array with byte-granularity write enable using a generate-for loop to create separate always blocks for each column

features.name: multi_column_memory_with_parameters
features.description: Code should include a parameterized multi-dimensional memory with separate controls for column width and number of columns

features.name: read_first_single_port_bram
features.description: Code should include a single-port BRAM with read-first behavior where the read address is captured on clock edge without write interaction
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk)
begin
do <= RAM[addr];
end
